# Security Policy

This file enables GitHub's native Security tab and "Report a vulnerability" button.

For the full security policy, see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) at the repository root.

## Quick Reference

- **Private disclosure:** Use the [GitHub Security Advisory](https://github.com/jsfaulkner86/ai-killswitch-protocol/security/advisories/new) form
- **Email fallback:** security@thefaulknergroupadvisors.com
- **PHI incidents:** Treat as potential HIPAA breach — escalate immediately
- **Response SLA:** Critical (PHI exposure) → 24hr acknowledgment, 7-day patch target

See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for full scope, severity tiers, invariants, and coordinated disclosure terms.
